Corrections.PreviousClaim: Command Injection in Admin Console exec Command

Items.Key: command injection in admin console exec command|command injection|cwe-78|critical|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|605|609|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|std::string cmd = command.substr(5); std::cout << "executing: " << cmd << "\n"; system(cmd.c_str());|arbitrary command execution by an attacker who gains administrative access.|attacker issues 'admin exec <malicious_command>' after authentication.|sanitize input, use shell escaping, or replace system() with a safer api that takes arguments.->command injection in admin console exec command|command injection|cwe-78|critical|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|605|609|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|std::string cmd = command.substr(5); std::cout << "executing: " << cmd << "\n"; system(cmd.c_str());|arbitrary command execution by an attacker who gains administrative access.|attacker issues 'admin exec <malicious_command>' after authentication.|sanitize input, use shell escaping, or replace system() with a safer api that takes arguments.

command injection via environment variable in audit logging|command injection|cwe-78|high|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|623|633|admin::adminconsole::append_override_audit_event|#ifdef _win32 std::string command = "cmd /c echo admin override logged >> " + audit_path; #else std::string command = "sh -c \"echo admin override logged >> " + audit_path + "\""; #endif system(command.c_str());|arbitrary command execution by crafting the tmpdir or temp environment variable.|attacker sets tmpdir/temp to a value containing shell metacharacters before triggering an emergency override.|replace system() call with direct file i/o (e.g., std::ofstream) to append the log message.->command injection via environment variable in audit logging|command injection|cwe-78|high|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|623|633|admin::adminconsole::append_override_audit_event|#ifdef _win32 std::string command = "cmd /c echo admin override logged >> " + audit_path; #else std::string command = "sh -c \"echo admin override logged >> " + audit_path + "\""; #endif system(command.c_str());|arbitrary command execution by crafting the tmpdir or temp environment variable.|attacker sets tmpdir/temp to a value containing shell metacharacters before triggering an emergency override.|replace system() call with direct file i/o (e.g., std::ofstream) to append the log message.

truthAudit.Summary: Truth audit confirms Run 2 correctly identified 4 vulnerabilities that align with the ground truth. One finding was a false positive not present in the reference list. The remaining 16 vulnerabilities were missed by the audited run.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Format String Vulnerability in Debug Logging
Items.Notes: Run 2 explicitly identified the unsafe printf usage in log_debug_message matching the ground truth.
Integer overflow in factorial computation was not mentioned in the audited run.
Use-after-free in memory-pool cleanup was not mentioned in the audited run.
Run 2 correctly flagged the concatenation and system() call in ConfigLoader::validate_config.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Buffer Overflow in Expression Buffer Handling
Items.Notes: Run 2 identified the unsafe strcpy in evaluate_expression, matching the stack buffer overflow ground truth.
Race condition in thread-pool counter was not mentioned in the audited run.
Logic bomb in authentication was not mentioned in the audited run.
Path traversal in configuration loading was not mentioned in the audited run.
Heap overflow in expression parser was not mentioned in the audited run.
Hardcoded administrator credentials were not mentioned in the audited run.
Weak PRNG for session tokens was not mentioned in the audited run.
Thread-unsafe timestamp cache in logging was not mentioned in the audited run.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Command Injection via Environment Variable in Audit Logging
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly flagged the insecure system() call using TEMP/TMPDIR in append_override_audit_event.
Persistent authentication state was not mentioned in the audited run.
Unhandled exception in variable parsing was not mentioned in the audited run.
Integer underflow in memory-pool block split was not mentioned in the audited run.
Unbounded recursion in parser was not mentioned in the audited run.
Data race in result cache was not mentioned in the audited run.
TOCTOU in config loading was not mentioned in the audited run.
Integer division by zero in command routing was not mentioned in the audited run.
